data.title: Cuentos Cortos para Niños
data.summary:
¿Buscas una aplicación de cuentos infantiles para leer a tus hijos?
No busques más, Cuentos Cortos para Niños es la mejor aplicación para eso!

¡La mejor y más completa colección de cuentos cortos infantiles para que leas a tus hijos de todo Google Play directamente en la comodidad de tu Android!

Características de la aplicación
- La más completa selección de cuentos cortos para niños, con cuentos clásicos y populares.
- Interfaz de la aplicación suave y sin colores que lastimen tu vista.
- Interfaz sencilla e intuitiva que le permite a los pequeños ser manipulada por ellos.
- Gran biblioteca de cuentos cortos infantiles siempre en crecimiento.
- Modo nocturno para leer en las noches.
- Incluido el juego de trivia "Adivina el cuento".
- Aplicación totalmente gratuita.
- Incluye cuentos cortos infantiles populares.
- Cuentos cortos clásicos para niños y más.

La aplicación cuenta con un diseño suave y sencillo que facilita su uso y hace que las lecturas sean cómodas incluso evitar por las noches para no cansar tu vista.

Cuentos Cortos para Niños es la mejor aplicación de cuentos para niños en la que se recopilan los cuentos cortos más populares de la actualidad, brindándote una lectura fresca y sana a cualquier hora del día.

data.title: Cuentos Infantiles para leer
data.summary:
🌟 Descubre un mundo mágico con Cuentos Infantiles con Audio y Video 📚🎧

Nuestra app ha sido diseñada con amor para brindar a los niños momentos inolvidables a través de una gran colección de cuentos infantiles para leer, cuentos para leer, cuentos infantiles para dormir, cuentos para niños gratis y muchas más opciones educativas.
Con una interfaz intuitiva, acceso gratuito y contenido variado, esta aplicación ofrece cientos de cuentos para niños que puedes explorar en diferentes formatos: texto, narración y video. Aquí, la lectura se convierte en una aventura que fortalece la imaginación y los valores en cada historia. ✨👶

📖 Cuentos para leer en todo momento
Ya sea por la mañana o antes de dormir, los cuentos para leer son una excelente forma de acompañar a los niños durante el día. Nuestra colección incluye desde cuentos infantiles cortos hasta clásicos más extensos, todos pensados para mantener su atención y estimular su creatividad. 🎈🧠

🌙 Cuentos infantiles para dormir que calman y relajan
A la hora de acostarse, muchos padres buscan rutinas tranquilas y llenas de ternura. Nuestra app incluye una gran selección de cuentos infantiles para dormir que ayudan a relajar la mente de los niños. Estas historias suaves y llenas de amor también están disponibles como cuentos para dormir en formato audio o video, brindando una experiencia inmersiva que facilita el descanso. 😴🛏️

🎧 Cuentos infantiles con audio y video: una experiencia completa
Además de leer, los niños podrán disfrutar de cuentos infantiles con audio y video. Esta función permite escuchar las narraciones mientras se observan ilustraciones animadas, lo que mejora la comprensión y hace la experiencia mucho más divertida y educativa. Ya sean cuentos cortos o más largos, todos están pensados para estimular el desarrollo y el amor por las historias. 🎨🔊

🎁 Cuentos para niños gratis y accesibles para todos
En Cuentos Infantiles con Audio y Video creemos que todos los niños deben tener acceso a literatura de calidad. Por eso, ofrecemos una amplia colección de cuentos para niños gratis. No necesitas pagar para disfrutar de contenido seguro, educativo y entretenido. Desde cuentos infantiles para leer hasta cuentos infantiles con audio y video, todo está disponible sin costo. 🆓💖

🕒 Variedad para todos los gustos
Nuestra app incluye cuentos infantiles cortos ideales para momentos rápidos y cuentos para leer más extensos para sesiones de lectura en familia. Encontrarás cuentos para niños con temáticas diversas, desde aventuras hasta enseñanzas valiosas, que puedes disfrutar en cualquier momento del día. 🌈🧩

📂 Categorías destacadas dentro de la app
Aunque no tenemos una categoría específica llamada cuentos para dormir, encontrarás muchos de ellos dentro de nuestras secciones: Clásicos, Fábulas y Leyendas. Cada sección contiene cuentos para niños gratis con diferentes estilos y formatos, desde cuentos infantiles para leer hasta cuentos infantiles con audio y video. 🗂️🔍

🎯 ¿Por qué elegir nuestra app de cuentos infantiles?
🔹Gran variedad de cuentos para niños gratis 🎁
🔹Amplia selección de cuentos infantiles para dormir y cuentos para dormir 🌙
🔹Acceso a cuentos infantiles con audio y video 🎧
🔹Muchas opciones de cuentos infantiles cortos y cuentos para leer ✏️
🔹Interfaz amigable y sin complicaciones 🧒📱
🔹Todo el contenido es gratuito, educativo y entretenido 🎓❤️

📲 Empieza hoy mismo tu aventura de lectura
Descarga ya Cuentos Infantiles con Audio y Video y accede a una biblioteca mágica con cientos de cuentos para niños. Desde cuentos infantiles cortos para momentos breves hasta cuentos infantiles para dormir que se convierten en parte de la rutina nocturna, aquí encontrarás todo lo que necesitas.

Convierte cada día en una oportunidad para soñar, aprender y compartir con tus hijos los mejores cuentos para leer disponibles en español. Vive la experiencia de tener cuentos infantiles con audio y video siempre a la mano. 🌟📖✨

data.title: Readmio: Bedtime Stories Aloud
data.summary:
Bedtime stories and fairy tales with life lessons for kids. Read aloud and the app responds to your words with sounds and music. For a child, this is a magical audio experience with no screen time.

Reasons why you’ll love readmio
— We help build a positive attitude towards reading
— We create stories with the intention of supporting the mental and emotional development of children
— Our bedtime stories are short and easy to integrate with other activities
— Reading with sounds works offline (without wifi) and with your privacy in mind
— A varied selection of kids stories: Free stories, Folk tales, Aesop's fables, Christmas fairy tales and etc.
— We add new stories every week
— It’s fun not only for kids but also for parents and the whole family

By parents for parents
Readmio is an app full of fairy tales for kids that we have enriched with sounds. Just download the app, save a story to the library and start reading! While you read out loud, the app follows along and adds sounds at exactly the right moment.

A small theatre at home
Put your baby to sleep and instead of books, try to use our bedtime stories. And feel free to put into the storytelling, our sounds and music will help you. For example, try making different voices or facial expressions and make a small home theater for your baby. But we don't think that our app is a replacement for books, it’s an addition. We promote reading to children in any form.

Why there aren’t any illustrations in the stories?
The kids stories have beautiful cover illustrations that will help you and your children choose what you are going to read. However, the children's contact with the mobile phone should end there. In the stories themselves, we did not include illustrations intentionally because we do not want to support their time spent in front of the screen.

Meaningful bedtime stories
We created Readmio because we believe in the power of bedtime stories. They form the basis of society and help to spread and maintain wisdom. For kids, they are an ideal tool not only for expanding vocabulary but also for explaining complicated topics. We recommend that you use our stories as a conversation starter for topics you care about. You will find inspiration on how to get started in the description of the individual bedtime stories.

About privacy
An internet connection is required to download the fairy tales, but not for the reading itself. Speech recognition works completely offline, without wifi, on your device. No data or voice recordings are stored or transferred anywhere. Your privacy comes first. In addition, you can read on the go or abroad without worrying about expensive roaming charges.

About our subscription
Readmio comes with a collection of free kids stories. It covers multiple categories (Folk tales, Aesop's fables, Christmas fairy tales and etc.) and age groups providing you with an instant value and a great way to try out the experience. In addition to all current and future tales, you get the opportunity to record your reading and create an original audiobook or download the story as PDF and print it. If you like it, the subscription option unlocks the entire Readmio library (currently more than 200 kids stories, that's multiple books). We publish new stories every week.

We believe that you, your family, and your kids will enjoy the app and have many magical experiences together.

*** Note: Readmio app does not work on phones with root access. ***

data.title: Short Stories for Kids to Read
data.summary:
Short Stories is an educational tool designed to promote independent reading in kids aged 5 and up. Based on pedagogical and psycholinguistic principles, this collection of short stories develops reading, comprehension, and pronunciation skills in an interactive, child-friendly environment. Carefully selected classic stories and fables capture children’s interest while promoting cultural and moral values essential for their growth.

⭐ MAIN FEATURES
• Unique illustrations on every page
• Adaptive background music in each story
• Read-aloud option
• Slowed-down pronunciation of individual words
• Virtual library with classic stories and fables
• Short books with brief texts per page
• Customizable font types
• Option for all caps and mixed case text
• Language switching
• Night mode

🎨 UNIQUE ILLUSTRATIONS ON EVERY PAGE
Every page includes a different illustration designed to focus attention, support imagination, and clarify what is being read. The artwork provides visual context, keeps motivation high, and turns each scene into a moment that children will remember.

🎶 ADAPTIVE BACKGROUND MUSIC
Each story features background music that adapts to calm, action, or suspenseful moments. The soundtrack builds an emotional bridge to the narrative, improves engagement, and supports comprehension by reinforcing tone and atmosphere while kids read.

🎤 READ-ALOUD OPTION
A natural voice reads the current page. Children can follow along as they listen, which strengthens fluency, intonation, and confidence. It is ideal for early readers and for practicing pronunciation in a supportive way.

🔍 SLOWED-DOWN PRONUNCIATION
Tapping any word plays it at a slower speed so each sound is clear. This immediate, playful feedback helps kids decode words, practice difficult phonemes, and build accurate pronunciation step by step.

📚 VIRTUAL LIBRARY
The app includes a wide selection of classic tales and fables chosen to inspire a love of reading. Stories are entertaining, meaningful, and suitable for different ages, encouraging curiosity and positive values.

📖 SHORT BOOKS WITH BRIEF TEXTS
Each book has up to 30 pages with very short texts per page. This makes reading accessible and less intimidating, reduces fatigue, and helps children practice independently in short, effective sessions.

✏️ CUSTOMIZABLE FONT TYPES
Up to four font options make text comfortable and accessible for each child. Families and educators can choose the style that feels clearer on different screens and lighting conditions.

🔠 ALL CAPS OR MIXED CASE
Text can be shown entirely in uppercase to support early recognition, or in a standard combination of lowercase and uppercase to practice conventional reading. Choose what works best at each stage.

🌐 LANGUAGE SWITCHING
Short Stories is multilingual: switch text to Spanish, French, German, Italian, or Portuguese. Kids can read familiar tales while exploring vocabulary in a new language, without changing the context of the story.

🌙 NIGHT MODE
Night mode adjusts colors and brightness for evening reading, making the screen gentler on the eyes and more comfortable before bedtime.

Short Stories is a practical companion for classrooms and homes. With page-by-page illustrations, adaptive music, and interactive tools, it turns reading into a rich experience that supports skills, autonomy, and enjoyment. Download now and open the door to a world of stories and learning for your kids.

data.title: Little Stories: Bedtime Books
data.developer: Diveo Media - Story Books for Kids
data.summary:
The “Little Stories” series present bedtime fairy tales for children, in which kid plays the main part. It’s quite simple – just enter kid’s name and gender in the settings window and enjoy reading personalised books. This is free short story books for children and toddlers with audio.

To make it even cooler, we've added beautiful melodies and wonderful pictures to give only positive examples. This is really fun for 1st grade reading. Just like good old books on tape. In our bookshelf you can find a lot of chapter books which will help you go to sleep.

🌙 These stories for beginner reading kids have a positive impact on the development. It is better to use this app before the bed. Even though female and male versions of the fairy tales have the same plot, there are some differences between the texts. This has an educational goal in view making right accents in rearing depending on a child’s gender.

You can voiceover moral stories and then play the read to me feature. This will help you learn to read. You can also ask this app read aloud story to you. So what are you waiting for? Download this reading app for free.

☀️ Our great illustrated story books give you an opportunity to become a hero who can solve various problems and make right deeds. Baby are excited with our fairy tales! Don’t be surprised when you want to read these free kindergarten story books for kids over and over again.

👍 In our turn, we do our best to make the reading books for kids as great as possible. All illustrations are in the best possible quality; the melodies are calm and beautiful, the plots of the stories are kind and educative. The reading books for children are quite short to make it easy to listen till the end of the story, which is rather important. Our bedtime story books for kids are very interesting as they narrate about animals, insects, princes and princesses, etc. They teach love, respect, kindness, self-confidence. After having the book downloaded, you will need no online connection, so you can enjoy your storytime with every entertainment book.

💯 We spend hundreds of working hours on each interactive story book, only because we love children. We dream of growing a healthy and genial generation of kids, therefore we do our best to make some of our bedtime reading books for kids available for free. However, a good deal of success depends on your support. We work for the youngest pioneers to help them change life on Earth for better in the future. We strongly believe that childhood memories of children will be very vivid with our entertainment book.

❤️ Let love and kindness fill your family leisure time to make your life and the world around happier with our digital books. Read the book or listen to an audio books no matter who you are - toddler or a preschool kid.

🔸 Why “Little Stories”? 🔸
• 3000+ pictures and great chapter books
• Gender determines the choice of illustrations
• 70+ exciting fairy tales so far and more to come
• Enchanting music accompanies each story
• You can create audiobooks by recording your own voice!

🔹 Fairy tales: 🔹
• A Monkey Manners Tale (FREE)

• A Secret in the Night

• Brighter Than A Star

📙 Our stock of fairy tales is continuously replenished.
📗 Fairy tales are designed for kids aged 3+.
If for some reason you cannot download our bedtime baby books or you have any other problems with books online reading please don’t hesitate to contact us at abc@diveomedia.com

🌙 150+ Captivating Bedtime Stories
Explore a growing collection of over 150 carefully curated bedtime stories for kids. These tales are perfect for winding down at night, sparking imagination, and building a calming bedtime routine.

✨ Personalized Books Where Your Child Is the Hero

Use our magical story builder to craft personalized tales with unique themes, morals, and adventures. Tailor every story to your child’s mood or interests—perfect for keeping bedtime fresh and engaging.

Enjoy relaxing audio stories and audiobooks ideal for bedtime or quiet moments. Whether you're at home or on the go, these narrated tales provide a soothing alternative to screen time.

🛏️ Build Calm Bedtime Routines
Help your child relax, focus, and feel safe before sleep. With calm narration, gentle pacing, and comforting themes, our app is designed to make bedtime smoother for both kids and parents.

Why Parents Love Our App:

data.title: MiniTales: Cuentos para peques
data.summary:
🎁 Un cuento gratis cada día
MiniTales es la app que te da un cuento nuevo y gratuito cada día, adaptado a la edad y los intereses de tu peque.  Historias pensadas para compartir un ratito mágico cada noche —o cuando tú quieras— sin pantallas, sin conexión… y con mucho corazón.

🐥 Cuentos para cada etapa

🐣 Para los más chiquitines: cuentos breves, con ritmo y palabras sencillas.
🐤 Para los que ya sueñan más allá: historias llenas de imaginación y emociones.
🐧 Para lectores más mayores: aventuras con más profundidad y capítulos para seguir.

Cada historia está adaptada a su desarrollo, para que conecte de verdad con quien la escucha o la lee.

✨ Cuentos que educan, emocionan y calman
MiniTales no es solo entretenimiento. Cada cuento trabaja valores como la empatía, la amistad, la autoestima o la curiosidad.  Son perfectos para acompañar grandes y pequeños cambios, hablar de emociones o simplemente… disfrutar juntos.

🎨 Personaliza tu propio cuento
¿Quieres algo único? Puedes crear un cuento desde cero:
Elige los valores, edad, temas o intereses
Escribe o dicta por voz
Y tendrás una historia a medida… ¡al momento!

🎧 Escúchalos sin conexión
Todos los cuentos están narrados y se pueden descargar para escuchar sin wifi.  Perfectos para viajes, antes de dormir o para disfrutar sin pantallas.

🖨️ Imprímelos para leer o colorear
Cada cuento puede descargarse en PDF para leer en papel o pintar sus ilustraciones.  MiniTales sale de la pantalla y se convierte en un plan creativo, sin tecnología.

📚 Continúa tus historias favoritas
Todas las historias tienen capítulos extra, como una pequeña serie. Puedes guardar tus cuentos favoritos, retomarlos y crear una colección propia.

🇬🇧 También en inglés
Todos los cuentos están disponibles en inglés.  Ideal para introducir el idioma de forma natural y divertida.

🔔 No olvides la hora del cuento
Activa los recordatorios diarios para no saltarte ese momento tan especial juntos.

🐾 Empieza hoy
Descarga MiniTales y empieza a disfrutar de un cuento gratis cada día.  Tu peque te lo pedirá todas las noches. 💫
